name: Skibidi Laser Kill
description: Skibidi Laser Kill Game is a fast-paced, action-packed laser shooter arcade game. Players take control of a laser-wielding character and must defend themselves against waves of oncoming enemies. The game features a variety of enemies, each with their own unique attacks. Players must use their skills and reflexes to dodge enemy fire and take them down.
